de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing

Class Location

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.Location

  • public class Location
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents a location like a local variable, method parameter, static field or an instance field on a specified object.
